evals.prompt: I have a vague idea for an AI tool that helps small businesses with customer support, but I don't know what niche to pick. Help me use a double diamond process to find the best wedge.
evals.expected_output: A broad opportunity map, clustered customer/problem areas, 3-5 scored candidate niches, and a recommended wedge with clear scope and validation steps.

evals.prompt: My startup idea feels too complex to pitch. There are agencies, freelancers, internal teams, and AI tools that can all do parts of it. Help me simplify without lying.
evals.expected_output: A structured process that separates core, proof, scope, and FAQ; narrows the customer/context; names alternatives and broken tradeoffs; and produces a scoped truthful one-liner.

evals.prompt: Ich will mit LLMs neue Startup-Ideen finden. Mir ist wichtig, erst maximal breit zu werden und danach hart zu spezifizieren. Fuehre mich durch den Prozess.
evals.expected_output: A German-language double diamond ideation workflow that first expands across audiences, moments, pains, alternatives, and solution shapes, then narrows into specific testable concepts.
